dialogues.text: (Let's check last week's income and expenses...)
(Last week, Nana-chan was my only customer again...)
(The number of customers is slowly increasing. I'll keep working hard.)
(There were many reservations last week. Things are going well.)
(The number of customers has increased considerably. I'm so busy I can barely keep up. Sales are doing well too!)
(T-there are too many customers...! Even working all day every day, I can't handle them all... It's honestly exhausting, but sales are booming!)
(There's still a lot of debt remaining. It's going to be a long road...)
(Repayment is going smoothly, but it's still just over half... I need to work harder.)
(I can almost pay off the debt. I need to put in more effort to earn money.)
(The debt is completely paid off! I'm finally free...!)
